subtitle: QQQ signal, prior-data only, trade TQQQ at today's open.

sell: Sell / go CASH when all trigger conditions fail (SSLP7_3 >= -0.02 AND ESLP100_3 >= -0.005 AND MOM100 <= -0.02), or SR150_200 >= 1.1, or SR63_126 >= 1.05, or MOM180 <= -0.10.
definitions: SMA7[t] = average of QQQ Opens from t-1..t-7
EMA100[t] = 100-day EMA of QQQ Opens using data up to t-1
SMA150[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-150
SMA200[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-200
SMA63[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-63
SMA126[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-126

plainEnglish: Stay invested when the medium trend is not too stretched and long-term momentum is above -10%.
At least one trigger must be supportive: 7-day slope softening, 100-day EMA slope softening, or 100-day momentum better than -2%.
Trend filters require SR150_200 < 1.1 and SR63_126 < 1.05.
All indicators use prior data (t-1 and earlier), and trades are modeled open-to-open in TQQQ.

indicators.label: SSLP7_3
indicators.description: 7-day SMA / same SMA from 3 trading days earlier - 1.

indicators.label: ESLP100_3
indicators.description: EMA100 / EMA100 from 3 trading days earlier - 1.
